title.en: Exactly! That's it! 정확해! 바로 그거야!

description.en: When someone pinpoints your thoughts or the answer perfectly! Learn "Jeong-hwak-hae" and "Baro geugeoya" through natural reactions.
description.ko: 상대방이 내 마음이나 정답을 족집게처럼 딱 맞혔을 때! 기분 좋게 외치는 "정확해"와 "바로 그거야"를 배워봅니다.

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존 씨... 저 지금 배가 너무 고픈데... 뭘 먹어야 할지 도저히 못 고르겠어요.
content.translation: John... I'm so hungry right now... but I really can't decide what to eat.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Hmm... I think I know exactly what you're craving. Mina. You want... something spicy... with lots of cheese... right?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 와~! "정확해~!" 어떻게 알았어요? 저 지금 딱 매운 떡볶이 생각하고 있었거든요!
content.translation: Wow~! 'Exactly~!' How did you know? I was just thinking of spicy Tteokbokki!

insight.title: 정확해
insight.usage_tip: Used when someone hits the mark on your thoughts or a fact.

content.speaker: John
content.text: I know you well! And you want it from that place around the corner. right?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 우와... 진짜..., "바로 그거야!" 존... 혹시 제 마음 읽는 거예요?
content.translation: Wow... seriously 'That's it!' John... are you reading my mind by any chance?

insight.title: 바로 그거야
insight.usage_tip: Used when someone pinpoints the specific thing you had in mind.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Maybe! I just felt it. "Exactly!"

content.speaker: John
content.text: "정확해" This is such a useful word when someone's guess is spot on.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 상대방이 던진 추측이나 대답이 100퍼센트 맞았을 때 "정확해!"라고 해주면 돼요.
content.translation: Right. When someone's guess or answer is 100 percent correct. you can just say 'Jeong-hwak-hae!'

content.speaker: John
content.translation: Exactly...,

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그리고 "바로 그거야"는 내가 딱 원하던 거나 생각하던 걸 상대방이 말했을 때 쓰는 표현이에요.
content.translation: And 'Baro geugeoya' is an expression used when someone says exactly what you wanted or were thinking of.

content.speaker: John
content.text: "바로..., 그거야!"
content.translation: That's exactly it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: What about when I agree with someone's point in a conversation.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그럴 땐 "내 말이!"라고 해보세요. "That's what I'm saying!"이라는 뜻으로 정말 자주 써요.
content.translation: In that case. say 'Nae mar-i!'. It's used very often to mean 'That's what I'm saying!'

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try another one. Imagine we are talking about a new movie. and I say. "I think the ending was a bit disappointing."

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 와... 존. "제 말이요!" 저도 결말이 좀 아쉬웠거든요.
content.translation: Wow... John. 'That's what I'm saying~!' I also found the ending a bit disappointing.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Right? It felt too rushed!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "정확해~!" 갑자기 이야기가 끝나버린 기분이었어요.
content.translation: Exactly~! It felt like the story just ended all of a sudden.

content.speaker: John
content.text: "That's it!" 정말 "바로 그거야!" 우리 통하는 게 참 많네요.
content.translation: That's it! It's really 'That's the one!' We really have a lot in common.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 하하. 그러니까 우리 단짝이죠!
content.translation: Hahahat! That's why we're best friends!

content.speaker: John
content.text: "Exactly!"

content.speaker: John
content.text: I love how these reactions make me feel like we're perfectly in sync.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 누군가와 마음이 딱 맞았을 때! 오늘 배운 표현들로 신나게 리액션해 보세요.
content.translation: When you're perfectly in sync with someone today! Try reacting excitedly with the expressions we learned today.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "exact" reactions.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number one. "정확해~!"
content.translation: Exactly!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number two. "바로 그거야!"
content.translation: That's it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number three. "내 말이~!"
content.translation: That's what I'm saying!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number four. "정답이야!"
content.translation: You got it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number five. "족집게네!"
content.translation: Spot on!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 마음이 "정확하게" 통하는 기분 좋은 하루 되세요!
content.translation: I hope you all have a pleasant day where you 'exactly' connect with someone!

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 정확한 숫자를 말해주세요. (Please tell me the exact number.)
바로 여기가 우리 집이에요. (Right here is my house.)
우리 엄마는 정말 족집게예요. (My mom is a real mind reader.)
너무 무서워서 소름이 돋았어요. (I got goosebumps because it was so scary.)
문제의 핵심을 잘 짚었네요. (You pinpointed the core of the problem well.)
우리는 유치원 때부터 단짝이었어요. (We've been best friends since kindergarten.)
